description:
Create a custom dropdown field in the SuiteCRM Contacts module using Studio. 

Field Label: 'Preferred Contact Method'
Field Name: 'preferred_contact_method'
Dropdown List Name: 'preferred_contact_method_list'
Options (Key -> Label):
- 'phone' -> Phone
- 'email' -> Email
- 'sms' -> SMS
- 'mail' -> Postal Mail
Default Value: 'email'
Required: No
Audited: No

Note: You only need to create the field; do not add it to any layouts.
